title: cyathea oblonga
intro: Cyathea oblonga, also known as the Queensland tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to Australia and New Guinea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cyathea oblonga include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. Cyathea oblonga can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
